Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-23 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: momentum-ranker Today's data reveals two starkly different momentum profiles. PL dominates with a rank-1 score of 94.6, driven by extraordinary long-term returns (698% in 1 year) and extreme consistency across timeframes, though its 1-day return of just 0.06% combined with a momentum flag of "overextended" and a 3.44 momentum signal suggest the move may have exhausted near-term fuel. LINC ranks second with more measured but still strong performance—149.59% annual return with steadier ratio progression (all 4 ratio passes)—and critically, a negative bad_spy_score of -0.6245 indicating it held up when SPY sold off, versus PL's weak 2.81 score on those down days. The data shows a tension between PL's spectacular but potentially fragile surge and LINC's more resilient, grinding uptrend, with both clearing all SMA gates and substantially outperforming SPY, QQQ, and IAU across multiple horizons.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
